summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Cancel Sale feature and Barcode Size/Color fix. All features working correctly - Cancel Sale modal with reason field, inventory restoration warning, disabled button until reason entered, cancelled sales display with strikethrough and red badge. Barcode Generator shows Size and Color checkboxes (checked by default) and label preview displays variant info correctly.
passed_tests: Sales History page shows Status column with Completed/Cancelled badges
Sales History has dropdown menu with View Details and Cancel Sale options
Cancel Sale modal opens with invoice info and reason text field
Cancel Sale modal shows warning about inventory restoration
Confirm Cancellation button is disabled until reason is entered
Confirm Cancellation button becomes enabled after entering reason
Cancelled sales show crossed-out amount (line-through) and Cancelled badge
Cancelled sales row has red-tinted background styling
Barcode Generator Label Preview shows Size and Color info (e.g., 'M / Blue')
Items API returns variants array with size and color properties
Size and Color checkboxes are checked by default in Barcode Generator
Cancel endpoint rejects already cancelled sales with 400 error
Sales list includes status field for filtering

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All Cancel Sale and Barcode features verified)

seed_data_creation: Cancelled INV-000001 for testing - reason: 'Testing cancel feature'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cancel Sale feature fully implemented and tested. PUT /api/sales/{sale_id}/cancel?reason=... endpoint cancels sale and restores inventory. Frontend shows Status column, dropdown with Cancel Sale option (hidden for already cancelled), modal with reason field and inventory warning. Barcode Size/Color fix: /api/items endpoint now includes variants array and populates item.size/item.color from first variant. BarcodeLabelGenerator uses showSize and showColor checkboxes (default true) to render variant info in label preview.

cancel_sale.status_tracking: cancelled status with cancel_reason, cancelled_at, cancelled_by_name

barcode_size_color.item_level_fields: item.size and item.color populated from first variant
barcode_size_color.ui_checkboxes: Size and Color checkboxes in Barcode Generator (default checked)
barcode_size_color.label_preview: Shows 'M / Blue' format when size/color available
